translations.Create, Display and Share \"old school\": Create, Display and Share "old school" albums for your photos, videos and panoramics, on your Nextcloud server.
translations.Relive your memories the way you used to:
Relive your memories the way you used to with paper albums: page after page, story after story.

**Souvenirs** lets you craft "old school" albums from the photos and videos already stored on your Nextcloud — and share them with the people who matter.

### ✨ What you can do

- 📖 **Browse albums like a book** — turn pages instead of scrolling through photo grids
- 🎨 **Create and edit albums** right from the web interface: pick your photos, arrange your pages, give each album a name and a date
- 🎬 **Mix media freely** — photos, videos, audio recordings and even 360° panoramas on the same page
- 🌐 **Explore panoramas** interactively thanks to the integrated 360° viewer
- 🔗 **Share with a simple link** — family and friends can enjoy your albums without a Nextcloud account
- 📱 **Pair with the [Souvenirs Android app](https://github.com/zorgluf/souvenirs-android)** to build albums on the go and sync them with your server
- ♻️ **Save space** — media already on your server is reused, not duplicated

### 🔒 Your souvenirs, your server

Albums are stored as plain folders and files on your own Nextcloud. No third-party service, no lock-in: your souvenirs stay yours.
translations.The previous drawing is missing on the s: The previous drawing is missing on the server, starting with a blank page.
Could not load the existing drawing.
translations.No album available. You will need to upl: No album available. You will need to upload them from the Android app Souvenirs (https://github.com/zorgluf/souvenirs-android).
Click to download album in a zip file.
Could not read the selected file.
translations.Could not link the selected image. It mu: Could not link the selected image. It must be located outside the Souvenirs albums folder.
